title: Why Your Skin Ages Faster After 40 (And What Science Says About Collagen)
seo_title: Why Skin Ages Faster After 40 — The Collagen Truth
meta_description: Collagen drops 1–2% per year after 25 and crashes after menopause. Learn why skin ages faster after 40 and what clinical research says about marine collagen and antioxidants.
excerpt: Skin does not just age — it ages because collagen production slows. After 40, estrogen decline accelerates this loss. Here is what the research says about marine collagen and antioxidants for skin that looks and feels its best.
tags: collagen, skin aging, marine collagen, women over 40, menopause, glutathione, antioxidants, skin health
author: Dr. Daniel Yadegar, MD
